title: oreophilus destitutus
intro: Oreophilus destitutus is a plant species, also known as the "Mountain Yellow-eyed Grass", which belongs to the family Iridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreophilus destitutus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its bronchodilatory properties. Oreophilus destitutus is often prepared as a tea or tincture and is also used in some herbal remedies to boost the immune system.
